summary: Rebuilt chapter 1 at the sentence-architecture level while preserving the chapter spine: failing-magic baseline, competence-as-armor domestic isolation, scar concealment, Malfoy-library assignment, Harry deflection, and the sleep-cost ending. The revision removes the repeated 'specific/particular' precision tic, eliminates em-dash dependence, drops 'She'-opened sentences below threshold, and corrects the timeline so the Manor is seven years behind her while the trial remains six.
